props.title: Thread Draft — Cost CLI Subcommand
props.description: Topic: cost CLI subcommand — PR #208 on aaronjmars/MiroShark

props.text: $1 to simulate anything. PR #208 makes that checkable from a terminal. `python cli.py cost <sim_id>` — the sim's dollar cost, locally, no dashboard login.

three cost surfaces now in MiroShark. cost.json API landed June 16 (PR #179) — lower bound on what a sim spent, flagged as an estimate since not all models are tracked. PR #190 put that number in the embed pill on the public sim page.

PR #208: `cmd_cost` in cli.py:201. the `~$` prefix mirrors the embed pill — both gate on `is_estimate`. exit code 2 when no cost recorded, so scripts can distinguish 'zero spend' from 'never ran'. 81 lines, 4 files.

all three surfaces read the same cost.json — one source, one undercount. that's the constraint: untracked models log as $0, so the number is a floor, not the full bill. shipping that caveat explicitly, in every surface, is the honest version of the claim.

props.title: PR #208 — cost CLI subcommand on MiroShark 🦈
